latin: Senex in spelunca obscura sedebat. cum iuvenis intravit, gladium ei porrexit et dixit: 'periculosum est solum ire. cape hoc!'

questions.prompt: What did the old man give the youth?
Why did the old man give the item?
questions.target: Because it is dangerous to go alone
choices: Because the youth paid for it
Because it is dangerous to go alone
Because he no longer needed it

translation: An old man sat in a dark cave. When the youth entered, he held out a sword to him and said: 'It is dangerous to go alone. Take this!'
